title: The 90-Day Defy the Odds Transformation
subtitle: For People Who Train Through Adversity, Not Despite It
author: William Marceau | Marceau Solutions
content_markdown:
## Who This Is For

You have a chronic health condition, an injury, a neurological limitation, or some other reason the world tells you to "take it easy." But you refuse. You train anyway. You just need the right system.

This program is for:

- People with autoimmune conditions who want to build muscle safely
- Cancer survivors rebuilding strength and confidence
- Anyone with neurological challenges (dystonia, MS, Parkinson's) who refuses to quit
- People recovering from major injuries who want to come back stronger
- Anyone told "you can't" who needs a coach who proves "you can"

This is NOT for people looking for easy. This is for people who embrace the pain and defy the odds.

---

## What's Included

### Weekly Group Coaching Call (Zoom, Recorded)

Every week, we meet live. I review programming, answer questions, troubleshoot plateaus, and coach in real-time. Every call is recorded so you never miss a beat. This alone replaces $200+/hr personal training sessions.

### AI-Powered Custom Programming (via FitAI Platform)

Your training program is built specifically for YOUR body, YOUR limitations, and YOUR goals. The FitAI platform generates evidence-based programming that adapts as you progress. No cookie-cutter templates.

### Evidence-Based Nutrition Framework

Not a meal plan. A framework. You'll learn how to fuel performance around your specific health needs — protein timing, anti-inflammatory nutrition, energy management for high/medium/low days.

### Peptide Protocol Guidance

For those interested in peptide-supported recovery (Tesamorelin, BPC-157, GH Secretagogues), I provide evidence-based education on protocols, sourcing, and integration with your training. This is not medical advice — it's informed coaching based on current research.

### Private Community Access

Connect with other people who train through adversity. Share wins, ask questions, get accountability from people who actually understand your situation.

### Weekly Check-In Accountability

Every Monday, you get a check-in. Every week, you report. No hiding. No ghosting. I track your progress and intervene when needed.

### Monthly 1:1 Progress Review

Once a month, we sit down 1:1 for 15 minutes. We review your data, adjust your programming, and set targets for the next month.

---

## Pricing

| Tier | What You Get | Price |
|------|-------------|-------|
| **Digital Program** | 30-day self-guided training system (PDF + video links) | **$19.99 one-time** |
| **Group Coaching** | Everything above: weekly calls, AI programming, nutrition, community, accountability, monthly 1:1 | **$97/month** |
| **Premium 1:1** | All group benefits PLUS weekly 1:1 calls, daily Voxer access, fully custom everything | **$1,500 one-time** or **$597/mo x 3** |

### Why Group Coaching at $97/mo Is the No-Brainer

Most online coaches charge $200-500/month for generic programming and a check-in text. You're getting live weekly coaching, AI-powered custom programming, peptide guidance, and a community of people who actually get it — for less than $25/week.

The Premium 1:1 tier is limited to **5 spots maximum**. When they're full, they're full.

---

## The Guarantee

**If you don't see measurable progress in 30 days, I'll coach you 1:1 for free until you do.**

That's not a refund. That's better than a refund. If the group program isn't moving the needle fast enough, I will personally work with you at no additional cost until we get results. I don't want your money if you're not getting better.

Measurable progress means: strength gains, body composition changes, mobility improvements, or symptom management improvements — tracked and documented.

---

## About Your Coach

### William Marceau

I train through brain cancer and dystonia. Every single day.

I'm not a coach who read about adversity in a textbook. I live it. My left side doesn't work the way it should. My brain has a tumor in it. And I still train harder than most people with perfectly functioning bodies.

I'm evidence-based, certified, and obsessed with the science of human performance under constraint. I've spent years studying how to optimize training for people whose bodies don't cooperate — because mine doesn't.

If you're looking for a coach who understands what it's like to fight your own body just to show up, you found him.

---

## The Hormozi Value Equation

Every offer should maximize dream outcome and perceived likelihood while minimizing time delay and effort/sacrifice. Here's how this one stacks up:

### Dream Outcome (Maximized)

You don't just "get in shape." You become the person who trains through adversity and wins. You build a body that defies what doctors said was possible. You join a community of warriors, not whiners. The transformation is physical AND identity-level.

### Perceived Likelihood of Achievement (Maximized)

Your coach literally has brain cancer and dystonia and still trains. The AI platform adapts to YOUR specific limitations. The weekly accountability means you can't fall through the cracks. The guarantee removes all risk. If I can do it, and I'll personally ensure you can too, the likelihood is as close to 100% as it gets.

### Time Delay (Minimized)

You start training in Week 1. Not "after onboarding" or "once we finish assessments." Your first custom program is generated within 24 hours of joining. Weekly coaching calls mean course corrections happen in real-time, not after months of wasted effort.

### Effort & Sacrifice (Minimized)

The AI handles programming. The nutrition framework eliminates decision fatigue. The community provides motivation. The weekly check-ins keep you accountable without you having to think about it. All you have to do is show up and train. Everything else is built for you.

---
